entities.name: Partial Completion
entities.context: Edge case pattern for logging workouts interrupted before finishing all exercises

entities.name: Substitutions
entities.context: Edge case pattern for logging when an alternative exercise replaces a prescribed one

entities.name: Bio-Log
entities.context: Implied exercise/health logging system that handles structured workout data

entities.name: Wall Push-Ups
entities.context: Example substitute exercise used in place of standard push-ups

entities.name: Deviation Note
entities.context: Structured annotation capturing when and why an exercise was substituted

relationships.context: Partial completions are logged with skipped items marked with reason 'interrupted'
Substituted exercises are logged with structured JSON including a notes field
Wall push-ups serve as an example of an exercise substitution
Deviation notes document what was substituted and why
